summary: P0 Route Deletion and Assignment Fix - All features verified. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Admin orders-ops list/detail enrichment working. Admin invoices enriched with payer_name. Customer orders show customer-safe timeline. Password toggle on login works. /dashboard redirects to /account. PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx confirmed deleted.

issues: Some invoices show '-' for Payer Name - this is expected for older invoices without payer info

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Route Deletion and Assignment Fix fully tested. All features working: 1) GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns enriched orders with customer_name, vendor_name, sales_owner, payment_state, fulfillment_state. 2) GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns enriched detail with customer, vendor_orders (with vendor details), sales_user, payment_proof, events, commissions, quote. 3) Admin orders table shows Customer, Vendor, Sales columns. 4) Admin order drawer shows 7 sections: Summary, Customer, Assignment, Payment, Fulfillment, Timeline, Admin Actions. 5) GET /api/admin/invoices/list returns payer_name and customer_name. 6) Admin invoice table shows 9 columns including Payer Name. 7) Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column. 8) GET /api/customer/orders returns customer_status and timeline_steps (customer-safe labels only: Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed). 9) Customer order drawer shows customer-safe timeline. 10) Login page has password show/hide toggle with data-testid='toggle-password-btn'. 11) /dashboard redirects to /account. 12) PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx confirmed deleted. 13) Notification bell shows notifications with unread count badge.

admin_orders_ops_list_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns orders with customer_name, vendor_name, sales_owner, payment_state, fulfillment_state. Supports tab and search params.

admin_orders_ops_detail_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns enriched object with order, customer, vendor_orders (with vendor_name, vendor_phone, vendor_email), sales_user, sales_assignment, events, payment_proof, commissions, quote.

admin_orders_table_columns.details: Admin orders table shows: Date, Order #, Customer, Source, Total, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor.

admin_order_drawer_sections.details: Admin order drawer shows 6 sections: Order Summary, Customer, Assignment (Sales + Vendor), Payment, Fulfillment, Admin Actions. Timeline section shows when events exist.

admin_invoices_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/invoices/list returns payer_name (with priority chain: invoice.payer_name → proof.payer_name → billing.invoice_client_name → customer_name) and customer_name (enriched from users collection).

admin_invoice_table_columns.details: Admin invoice table shows 9 columns: Date, Invoice No, Customer, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status, Invoice Status, Linked Ref.

customer_invoice_payer_name.details: Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column. GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name field.

customer_orders_timeline.details: GET /api/customer/orders returns customer_status and timeline_steps with customer-safe labels only (Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed). No vendor-internal labels exposed.

customer_order_drawer_timeline.details: Customer order drawer shows customer-safe timeline with steps: Ordered, Confirmed, In Progress, Quality Check, Ready, Completed.

password_toggle.details: Login page has password show/hide toggle with data-testid='toggle-password-btn'. Clicking toggles input type between 'password' and 'text'.

partner_fulfillment_page_deleted.details: PartnerFulfillmentPage.jsx does not exist. Confirmed via glob search.

notification_bell.details: Notification bell visible in header with unread count badge (showing '23'). Dashboard shows Notifications section with '4 new' indicator.
